pattern: Compute the size imbalance and use a hash set to find the unique box pair that corrects it in a single linear pass.
hints: After the swap, Alice and Bob must each hold (sumA + sumB) / 2 candies. That means if Alice gives away a box of size a, she needs to receive a box of size b = a - (sumA - sumB) / 2.
Store Bob's box sizes in a hash set. Iterate through Alice's sizes and for each a check whether b = a - diff is present in the set, where diff = (sumA - sumB) / 2.
Compute diff = (sumA - sumB) // 2. For each a in aliceSizes: if (a - diff) is in the set of bobSizes, return [a, a - diff]. Both sizes must be positive, which is guaranteed by the constraints.

edge_inputs.description: each has two boxes, swapping one of each equalises
Alice has one box, Bob has two
equal totals after swapping same-size boxes
Alice has many boxes but one large one must be swapped
large values where diff is exactly half the imbalance
both start equal after the specific swap

stress.description: construct a guaranteed-valid instance: pick target sum, build both sides summing to it, then add an imbalance
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size // 2)
    # Build Alice: n random values summing to some amount
    alice = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    # Imbalance: difference must be even for a valid swap to exist
    # Pick a box from each side and ensure the math works out
    a_box = rng.randint(1, 100)
    b_box = rng.randint(1, 100)
    # Add boxes to each list
    alice.append(a_box)
    bob = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    bob.append(b_box)
    # Compute sums; adjust alice[0] to force (sumA - sumB) == 2*(a_box - b_box)
    sumA = sum(alice)
    sumB = sum(bob)
    # Force sumA - a_box + b_box == sumB - b_box + a_box
    # => sumA - sumB == 2*(a_box - b_box)
    # Adjust alice[0] to make this true:
    needed_diff = 2 * (a_box - b_box)
    alice[0] = max(1, alice[0] + (needed_diff - (sumA - sumB)))
    return [alice, bob]
stress.note: constructs input so a valid swap always exists; iterating aliceSizes in order yields the deterministic first valid pair
